rows.label: qev080401_MSG0001
rows.name:
By the way, I haven't seen Mother
lately. Do you know anything?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Could it be that she was so noisy
that she touched [ST:playername ]'s reverse scale
and got scrapped and thrown away?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_JNK0010
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev080401_SEL0011
rows.name:
State that you wouldn't put Erio's
mother through something like that.

rows.label: qev080401_JNK0020
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev080401_SEL0021
rows.name:
Grumble that you'd very much like to do
exactly that, emotionally speaking.

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0003
rows.name: You're kind after all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0004
rows.name:
But, try being next to her for even an
hour and listening to that chatter. You
absolutely wouldn't be able to stand it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0005
rows.name:
It wouldn't be strange to think
about punishing that arrogant and
insolent personality of hers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0006
rows.name: I understand that feeling well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Ever since she was remade by
Doctor B, she's been like a
child with a huge attitude...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0008
rows.name:
Just thinking that *that* gave birth
to us makes my head hurt a bit—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hrm... Anyway, if [ST:playername ] doesn't know,
then I'm a bit concerned.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0010
rows.name:
She can no longer send direct orders
to my sisters, but there are still
quite a few who worship Mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Recently, she seemed to be talking an
awful lot with a Definia named Lyvia...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Hey? Could you try to find
Mother's whereabouts just in case?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0013
rows.name:
If she did run away, it's surely because
she has some worthless scheme in mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0014
rows.name:
I'm always causing you
trouble. Thanks for the help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0015
rows.name:
Well then, first... please try looking
for the Definia named Lyvia who had
been in contact with Mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0016
rows.name:
I believe she's still in NLA,
but... she's a Definia, so she
must be disguised as an Earthling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Gather eyewitness information, expose
her true form, and then interrogate
her about Mother's whereabouts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0018
rows.name:
Right up until she vanished,
a Definia named Lyvia frequently
came to visit Mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0019
rows.name:
When I asked Mother, she
claimed she was giving her
advice on her worries, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Thinking about it, there's no way that lump of self-interest
would listen to someone's worries out of goodwill. There
absolutely has to be something between her and Lyvia.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Expose Lyvia's true identity in this
city and find out Mother's whereabouts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0022
rows.name:
With the watchful eyes of so
many Earthlings around, there
must be eyewitness reports.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0023
rows.name:
So she's in Wayne Cave in
Bōkyaku no Keikoku...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'm getting a bad feeling about this.
Please, hurry and bring Mother back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0025
rows.name:
I'll head over as soon as my
preparations are complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Hey, [ST:playername ]. I have a little
something I'd like to ask you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0027
rows.name:
...You're making a "who are
you?" face, aren't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0028
rows.name: It's Erio. ...The Definia, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev080401_MSG0029
rows.name:
I took on this form to live
in NLA. It's quite fun.[ST:wait ]
